channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Speed Sleep
item.description: The more players that are sleeping, the faster time passes. 100% of players asleep = vanilla

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: C&N Jewelry
item.description: Rough/cut gems/jewelry and encrusting in the armor/tools with buffs

item.title: Window Storage Lib - Transform Patches
item.description: Patches mods to to make them look better in mods that use Window Storage Lib slots

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses. Requires Rustbound Magic as well

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: DWC Classes
item.description: Custom classes for DWC's private server.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Metal Ladders
item.description: Adds metal ladders

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Automated Server Messages
item.description: Admins can set recurring server-wide messages everybody can see.

item.title: Use Beeswax instead of Fat
item.description: I couldn't find the motivation for animal husbandry, but I do have many many bees.

item.title: Modular Backpacks Lights Out
item.description: Simple change to Modular Backpacks to remove lantern attachment.

item.title: Uppsalchemy
item.description: A multi-tier alchemy system that uses A Culinary Artillery bottles.

item.title: More Roads and Paths 2.0.0
item.description: What do you THINK this adds?

item.title: Immersive Backpacks
item.description: Makes backpacks visible on the player and redesigns the mechanic with immersion and realism in mind.

item.title: Pencil
item.description: Adds a pencil that can be used to write on signs and in books

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: GamepadCompanionVS
item.description: Native gamepad support for Vintage Story 1.22+ — 12-slot radial menu, virtual cursor for GUI, etc.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Liquid Containers (Unofficial)
item.description: Update of Liquid Containers to 1.22.

item.title: Seasonal Flowers
item.description: Flowers now sprout, bloom, die back, and go dormant. (The mod that hides flowers in the winter)

item.title: Falx to Sword
item.description: The barbaric Falx not your liking? Take this Arming Sword instead.

item.title: Falx To Warhammer
item.description: Turns your trusty Falx into an even trustier Warhammer. Smash your enemies rusty bones!

item.title: JSCM Frozen Struggles
item.description: A new modpack for my girlfriend and I. Focused around a Sub-Artic playthrough

item.title: Cozy Pierzynas
item.description: Adds new uses for feathers. Pillows and duvets in many colors.

item.title: FasterSteel
item.description: Makes blister steel production faster by reducing the heat hours needed. Configurable.

item.title: Dumbwaiter
item.description: A medieval-style lift for moving between vertically-separated floors. Now with labels.

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic gridless crafting system that completely replaces all UI grid recipes

item.title: Medieval Expansion Patch No Waterwheel
item.description: A fork of the fork of Medieval Expansion to disable Waterwheels
